requirements.requirement: Establish a board-approved technology risk governance framework with defined roles, responsibilities, and reporting lines
requirements.rationale: Ensures board-level accountability for technology risk as expected by SC-GL/6-2023

requirements.requirement: Designate a CISO or equivalent with adequate authority, independence, and resources for technology risk management
requirements.rationale: SC guidelines expect dedicated cybersecurity leadership for capital market entities

requirements.requirement: Develop and maintain a comprehensive technology risk policy suite, reviewed and approved by the board annually
requirements.rationale: Provides policy foundation for technology risk management across all domains

requirements.requirement: Produce quarterly technology risk reports for board and senior management
requirements.rationale: Ensures ongoing visibility of technology risk posture at governance level
